sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed when clicking the red dot
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']
after = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']

# Find red objects in before and after
print("BEFORE red objects:")
for n in before:
    if n['color'] == 'r':
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

print("AFTER red objects:")
for n in after:
    if n['color'] == 'r':
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Check bar sizes
print("\nBEFORE bars:")
for n in before:
    if n['color'] in ('N', 'Y') and n['pixels'] > 5:
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

print("AFTER bars:")
for n in after:
    if n['color'] in ('N', 'Y') and n['pixels'] > 5:
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
